_comment: CANONICAL COMMITTED POLICY. Its SHA-256 (over this file, canonicalised: sorted keys, no whitespace, keys starting with _ stripped) is published to the agent's ERC-8004 identity BEFORE code-lock. Every live decision receipt references that hash. BNB Hack Track 1: live PnL on BSC (chain 56) 6/22-28, judged on returns + drawdown + risk-adjusted + rule adherence, 6% max-drawdown elimination gate. Survival-first.

trending._comment: CMC-trending names admitted only if they pass these filters at decision time; else abstain.

signal._comment: Take risk only when 1h and 4h momentum agree in sign AND realized vol < vol_enter_max.

risk._comment: max_drawdown_pct is the competition elimination gate. Risky exposure is capped low (12%) so even a deep crash of the whole risky sleeve stays inside the gate; the ladder de-risks earlier still.

min_trades._comment: Scheduled tiny in-policy rebalances guarantee the minimum qualifying trade count without overtrading.

data._comment: CMC MCP is the only market-data source; stale data (age > max_data_age_seconds) blocks trading.
